response: Create one section comparing pruning, quantization, distillation, and sparse activation for on-device inference.

Mechanism comparison: quantization changes numeric precision whereas pruning removes parameters. Taxonomy: category one is post-training quantization; category two is quantization-aware training; category three is structured pruning; category four is distillation. Evaluation protocol: benchmark latency, memory, accuracy, and energy on device. Negative evidence: aggressive compression can fail on long-tail tasks and calibration drift. Engineering implication: production deploy requires hardware-aware kernels and rollback criteria.
